# PlayStation Blog

- **Source ID:** `playstation-blog`
- **Category:** official
- **Feed URL:** `https://blog.playstation.com/feed/`
- **Homepage:** https://blog.playstation.com
- **Source Weight:** 0.95

## Notes

Official Sony/PlayStation channel. Treated as an `official` source — mentions count toward `official_mentions_72h` in the trending formula, which boosts trending scores by 10× per mention.
Content includes State of Play announcements, PS Plus reveals, game launches, and first-party news.
